title: senecio voigtii
intro: Senecio voigtii, also known as the hairy fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a bronchodilator, helping to relax the muscles in the airways. The health benefits of Senecio voigtii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as asthma and chronic bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Senecio voigtii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
